name: Easy Blueberry Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 4 cups fresh blueberries, halved if large
3/4 stick butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a 9x13 inch baking dish, melt butter or margarine over low heat.
3. In a saucepan, combine blueberries with 1/2 cup granulated sugar and bring to a boil.
4. Sift together flour, granulated sugar, and baking powder into a bowl.
5. Gradually add enough milk to the dry ingredients until a thick batter forms.
6. Pour the batter over the melted butter in the baking dish.
7. Sprinkle remaining sugar on top of the batter.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
